note: Descriptive multiplicity discount over the 4-family x 2-seed x 7-period guarded roster (seeds mean-aggregated per family-period before the matrix). With 7 (odd) periods the CSCV split is a floor/ceil odd-block adaptation (3 in-sample / 4 out-of-sample), not canonical symmetric CSCV; PBO (Bailey et al. 2017) and the worst-family min_family_lcb are overfitting/uncertainty discounts, never a significance test and never a significance claim.
